PROJECTS WORKSHOPS MUSIC BIO RESUME EXHIBITIONS RESIDENCIES EVENTS WRITINGS

Residency Curation Submission

This curated portfolio highlights key interactive signal mappings and organic structural installations developed as template pieces. It illustrates the progression from earlier biological sculpture investigations (Project 2) to real-time interactive electronics (Project 1).

Project Title 2 (Archived)

2024 · Different City, Country

This project represents an earlier exploratory phase focusing on static bio-sculptures and organic textures.

Created during a summer residency, the installation examined the decomposition of raw vegetable fibers over a period of 40 days.

Exhibition Venues

  1. Creative Arts Lab, City Gallery, 2024.
  2. BioMedia Art Space, 2024.

Project Title 1

2026 · City, Country

This artwork is a dynamic light installation. It represents a physical mapping of electronic signals in a dark gallery context.

The light output is modulated in real-time according to ambient sonic changes in the room. The viewer's presence triggers variations in density, speed, and contrast.

Concept and Materials

By projecting light onto suspended optical prisms, the colors separate and bend across the walls, creating an immersive, architectural scale.

  • Custom modular micro-controller.
  • Suspended custom-cut glass prisms.
  • Pure data sonic mapping engine.
